steps.name: Given user goes to "electronics-on-emis" page of "BFLHome" website
When user swipes the reels to left and plays the reel
Then user verifies BFLElectronics reels player functions Play,MuteSDKReel,CustomSeekToEndInReel,SwipeUp,SwipeDown,SwipeUp,CloseFabReel
